category_sources: source_facts.description says small static webserver without CGI; official darkhttpd homepage describes a simple static web server.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is darkhttpd; official homepage and repository use darkhttpd.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the repository documentation surface for running darkhttpd.
Official darkhttpd homepage documents features, security behavior, limitations, and clone URL.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/emikulic/darkhttpd; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official homepage lists HTTP GET/HEAD, directory listings, IPv6, chroot, privilege dropping, and static-only limitations.
source_facts.description says small static webserver without CGI and current_curation.tags includes cli.
